commands_run: python -B -m pytest tests/test_hypothesis_packet.py tests/test_conversation_engine.py tests/test_llm_work_response.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
python -B -m py_compile wabi_sabi\core\hypothesis_packet.py wabi_sabi\core\conversation_engine.py wabi_sabi\core\llm_work_response.py wabi_sabi\cli\main.py
decisions: Unit distance lesson absorbed as operational method, not as public/scientific claim.
HypothesisPacket requires claim, counterclaim, falsifiers, evidence_required, ActionGate and publication boundary.
Wabi hypothesis mode remains proposal_only and never applies sources or calls cloud.
Scientific/public/commercial claims remain REVIEW until separate human review and stronger evidence.
pending: Run a real project claim through wabi hypothesis and attach local falsifier evidence.
Expose the mode in the active BRAIN_OS UI only under a separate gate because that path is outside the primary workspace touched in this cycle.
next_action: Use .\wabi.cmd hypothesis "claim concreto del motor" --json, then execute one local falsifier and attach evidence before reuse.
